testcase.classname: Scoring Algorithm Improvements — IQR Outlier Filtering
testcase.name: Cache hit when price changes less than 5%
testcase.system-out: Given a cached AI analysis for listing "listing-stable" at price 200........passed When the listing is re-checked with current price 205.......................passed Then the cached analysis should be returned.................................passed And the stale analysis flag should be false.................................passed

testcase.classname: Scoring Algorithm Improvements — IQR Outlier Filtering
testcase.name: Full cache invalidation when price drops more than 15%
testcase.system-out: Given a cached AI analysis for listing "listing-price-drop" at price 200....passed When the listing is re-checked with current price 160.......................passed Then no cached analysis should be returned..................................passed And the stale analysis flag should be false.................................passed

testcase.classname: Scoring Algorithm Improvements — IQR Outlier Filtering
testcase.name: Stale flag when price changes between 5% and 15%
testcase.system-out: Given a cached AI analysis for listing "listing-stale" at price 200.........passed When the listing is re-checked with current price 220.......................passed Then the cached analysis should be returned.................................passed And the stale analysis flag should be true..................................passed

testcase.classname: Scoring Algorithm Improvements — IQR Outlier Filtering
testcase.name: Legacy cache entry with null analyzedAtPrice is treated as expired
testcase.system-out: Given a cached AI analysis for listing "listing-legacy" with null analyzedAtPrice..passed When the listing is re-checked with current price 200.......................passed Then no cached analysis should be returned..................................passed

testcase.classname: Scoring Algorithm Improvements — IQR Outlier Filtering
testcase.name: Cache entry with zero analyzedAtPrice always invalidates
testcase.system-out: Given a cached AI analysis for listing "listing-free" at price 0............passed When the listing is re-checked with current price 50........................passed Then no cached analysis should be returned..................................passed

testcase.classname: Scoring Algorithm Improvements — IQR Outlier Filtering
testcase.name: Cache write includes analyzedAtPrice
testcase.system-out: Given a fresh AI analysis is cached for listing "listing-new" at price 300..passed Then the cache entry should have analyzedAtPrice set to 300.................passed

testcase.classname: Scoring Algorithm Improvements — IQR Outlier Filtering
testcase.name: Deduplication lock prevents concurrent refresh storms
testcase.system-out: Given listing "listing-dedup" is marked as refreshing.......................passed When another refresh is attempted for listing "listing-dedup"...............passed Then the refresh should be skipped because it is already in progress........passed
